text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ooooof! That should do it for today's training,
right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I think we made good prog—huh? Is that?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, don't tell me you're going to follow me
the whole way around the perimeter.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But of course! As if I could overlook the hard
work of a rival such as you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Nay, I'll wring every last drop of energy from my
body to keep up with you! Ohhh, what a stirring
scene!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What scene? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Yes, we're off to a great start!
Now, it's time that I overtake you in a blaze of
glory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohghasfkh! What on earth was that?! One-sided
rivalry?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's clear as day. We've got a classic case of "I can't stand to be with her, but I can't stand to be without her." ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Welp! There's nothing for me to do now but run
after them... Not too close, but not too far...
choice_data_list: So long as you stay out of sight, okay?
No, you'll wind up overworking yourself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Not drawing attention to yourself is
rule number one of oshi watching!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to sneaking around undetected
and watching my oshis, not even a ninja can best
me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm off for another run! Zooom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before long, Agnes Digital comes back in a tizzy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Yeah, you're right, I shouldn't run
anymore today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But if I follow them, we don't have to call it
training. It's more like recreation. That's it! It's not
exercise, it's just simping!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital tries to reason her way into getting
my permission, but, unwilling to let her overwork
herself, I send her home.
